# Changelog

All notable changes to the @nice-devone/ui-components package will be documented in this file.

## 26.1.1 - 2026-03-03 ##

### Added

- Initial public release exposing 4 components:
  - Voice Preference Component (ccf-acd-session)
  - Contact History Component (ccf-agent-contact-history)
  - Outbound Options Component (ccf-outbound-options)
  - Voice Transcription Component (ccf-voice-transcription)

## 26.2 - 2026-04-29 ##

### Added

  - System information Component
   (ccf-system-information.tsx)

### Notes
- Components extracted from CMA application for public use
- Built on top of @nice-devone/ui-controls foundational library
- See README.md for detailed usage examples and documentation
- Components have been refactored for public consumption
- All components follow enterprise-grade coding standards
